title: Fair Assessments
summary: Ensure consistent valuation standards across neighborhoods and property classes.
keyPoints: The real estate market changes faster than policy and systems can keep up
We need consistent valuation standards across all neighborhoods
Fairness for both residential and commercial property classes
whyItMatters: Inconsistent assessments lead to unfair tax burdens
Every property owner deserves to be treated equally under the law

title: Proactive Service
summary: Improve communication with property owners before reassessment cycles to reduce confusion and appeals.
keyPoints: Communicate with property owners before reassessment cycles
Reduce confusion and the need for appeals
My door is open, my phone is on
whyItMatters: Homeowners and business owners deserve expertise, competence, and communication
Proactive outreach builds trust in the Assessor's office

title: Accurate Data
summary: Invest in updated systems and modern valuation tools to improve reliability and reduce errors.
keyPoints: Invest in updated systems and modern valuation tools
Improve reliability and reduce errors in property valuation
Use national best practices and technology
whyItMatters: Accurate data is the foundation of a fair assessment
Errors in valuation directly impact the taxes individuals and businesses pay

title: Transparent Process
summary: Provide clearer explanations of valuation methodology and easier access to appeal information.
keyPoints: Provide clearer explanations of how values are determined
Make access to appeal information easier
Be a fair and honest dealer in leading the Assessor's office
whyItMatters: Transparency is essential for public trust
Residents should understand how their property values are calculated

title: Proven Experience
summary: Bringing real estate expertise, business leadership, and economic development experience to the Assessor's office.
keyPoints: MBA from Washington University in St. Louis and Eagle Scout
Former Project Leader at Greater St. Louis, Inc. driving regional economic growth
whyItMatters: The Assessor's office requires technical competence, not just political connections
Dave's background ensures he understands both residential and commercial property impacts
